title: High Court Bail Docket IN-BAIL-2023-0399
summary: Pappu Singh was arrested for possession of 1500 tablets of Tramadol Hydrochloride (Colovidol-100 SR) without a valid permit or license, along with a co-accused who has since passed away. He had been in custody for over 1 year and 6 months with no witnesses examined out of 18 cited, and no other c...
